sources.title: Tin Man | Part 1 of 3 | "Into the Storm" | 2007 | Zooey Deschanel, Alan Cumming | Wizard of Oz
sources.description:
A violent twister sweeps the restless young DG away to the O.Z., a darkly magical realm on “the other side” that’s no place like home.

This $20M Sci-Fi Channel  epic mini-series dramatically reimagined L. Frank Baum's The Wonderful Wizard of Oz stories, achieving record ratings for its premiere and earning 9 Emmy nominations.

Watch episode 2 HERE: https://youtu.be/z5kqzJtglbs

Zooey Deschanel
Neal McDonough
Alan Cumming
Raoul Trujillo
Kathleen Robertson
Anna Galvin
Doug Abrahams
Blu Mankuma
Richard Dreyfuss

Fantasy
Adventure
Family

2007
Directed by Nick Willing

metadata.Plot: Winston Churchill is named Prime Minister on the very day the Nazis launch their invasion of the low countries and France. The immediate concern is the fate of the British Expeditionary Force now trapped with their back to the sea. The evacuation at Dunquerque saved most of them. Churchill formed a unified government with the Labour party and was steadfast in refusing to negotiate with the Germans. He developed a personal relationship with U.S. President Roosevelt but England (as Churchill always referred to the UK) stood alone until the U.S. entered the war. By war's end however, Labour won the election and Churchill was out of office.
metadata.Actors: Brendan Gleeson, Clive Mantle, Adrian Scarborough
metadata.Awards: Won 2 Primetime Emmys. 5 wins & 37 nominations total
